Fields.Name: Disable Param - Network Test
Fields.Description: Parameters marked with  are excluded in the NT version package.

Fields.Name: Accessory Group
Fields.Description: Items of the same group cannot be equipped at the same time

Fields.Name: Rarity
Fields.Description: Rarity used in item acquisition logs

Fields.Name: Sort Group ID
Fields.Description: Sort item type ID. In the sort Item type order, the same ID is displayed together as the same group.

Fields.Name: Can Drop
Fields.Description: Allows talisman to be dropped from inventory

Fields.Name: Enable Visual Codex
Fields.Description: Allows talisman to appear in the Visual Codex

Fields.Description: The attached effect to apply when this talisman is equipped.
